tools.name: movscript_list_productions
tools.description: List productions in the current or specified project. Use this before production orchestration when the active production is missing or ambiguous.

tools.name: movscript_read_production_context
tools.description: Read the selected production/episode script, existing segments, scene beats, shot plans, creative materials, and asset needs before generating a production proposal draft.

tools.name: movscript_check_entity_conflicts
tools.description: Check a proposed production proposal tree against existing business items so the agent can reuse or update instead of duplicating segments, scene beats, creative materials, asset needs, or shot plans. Pass scope='project' to check reusable creative materials across all productions and get reuse candidates.

tools.name: movscript_create_production_proposal
tools.description: Create an empty local production proposal draft for one production/episode so the agent can fill it incrementally with business editing tools.

tools.name: movscript_inspect_production_proposal_context
tools.description: Inspect incremental context before editing a production proposal: current production reference, user request, attached/recent resources, latest proposal draft, and compact proposal node summaries.

tools.name: movscript_get_production_proposal
tools.description: Read one local production proposal draft as structured JSON for review or incremental editing.

tools.name: movscript_list_production_proposal_nodes
tools.description: List compact node summaries from a production proposal draft, including paths, node types, references, local references, titles, actions, and parent paths.

tools.name: movscript_upsert_proposal_scene_moment
tools.description: Create or update one scene beat in a production proposal draft under a specific segment.

tools.name: movscript_upsert_proposal_reference
tools.description: Create or update one creative material usage in a production proposal draft under a specific scene beat.

tools.name: movscript_upsert_proposal_asset
tools.description: Create or update one asset need in a production proposal draft under a specific scene beat.

tools.name: movscript_upsert_proposal_keyframe
tools.description: Create or update one keyframe under a scene beat or shot plan. This records a keyframe candidate in the draft for UI review.

tools.name: movscript_upsert_proposal_shot
tools.description: Create or update one shot plan in a production proposal draft under a specific scene beat.

tools.name: movscript_upsert_production_proposal_node
tools.description: Create or update one node inside a production proposal draft. Supports segment, scene beat, shot plan, creative material, and asset need nodes without rewriting the whole proposal JSON.

tools.name: movscript_delete_production_proposal_node
tools.description: Delete one node from a production proposal draft by node type plus reference or local reference. Deleting a segment or scene beat also removes its nested proposal nodes.

tools.name: movscript_propose_production_entities
tools.description: Create a local client-review production proposal draft for one production/episode. The draft contains a proposal tree of segments, scene beats, shot plans, creative materials, and asset needs; it does not write backend project items.
